videos.headline: Oregon stays undefeated with road win over Michigan
videos.description: Oregon uses a big second half to go on the road and beat Michigan to improve to 9-0.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Oregon stays undefeated with road win over Michigan) 2024/11/02 ESHEET SOTFULL

videos.headline: Oregon takes early lead as Evan Stewart makes sweet TD grab
videos.description: Dillon Gabriel throws a pinpoint pass to Evan Stewart for a touchdown on Oregon's opening drive.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Oregon takes early lead as Evan Stewart makes sweet TD grab) 2024/11/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dillon Gabriel scrambles up the middle for a 23-yard TD
videos.description: Dillon Gabriel avoids the rush and goes up the middle for a 23-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dillon Gabriel scrambles up the middle for a 23-yard TD) 2024/11/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Michigan gets back in the game with a Peyton O'Leary TD
videos.description: Michigan quarterback Davis Warren scrambles and slings it to Peyton O'Leary for a touchdown in the third quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Michigan gets back in the game with a Peyton O’Leary TD) 2024/11/02 ESHEET
